base_context.founder_vision: 30-year veteran florist's experience digitalized as a 'Second Brain'.
base_context.target_users: Florists, flower shop owners, B2B marketing admins.
base_context.tech_stack: Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind (if requested), Premium Vanilla CSS, Framer Motion.

colors.dark_mode: Sleek, deep blacks/grays with vibrant accents

operational_constraints: NEVER create basic MVPs; always aim for premium excellence.
ALWAYS implement unique IDs for interactive elements.
Maintain strictly consistent brand voice across all generated content.
